intention: 努力做某事（持续付出努力去提升或建立某项能力）
sentencePatterns: I'm working hard to build my ___.
She's been working hard to build her ___ in ___.
realLifeExamples: I'm working hard to build my vocabulary.
He's working hard to build his reputation as a reliable engineer.
productionPrompts: 你怎么描述自己在努力提升某项能力？用 work hard to build 说出来。
